caption: The video displays a screen recording of a financial trading interface titled "Optfx Pro Trader 11/27/2013 (WTI_ 1 Minute)". Each frame shows a candlestick chart tracking price movements, with a green and red bar graph at the bottom and several curved trend lines intersecting the price action. A white cursor arrow moves across the screen, interacting with the chart. In the top-left frame, the time is "13:15:52", and the cursor is positioned in the center of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the cursor moves toward the upper right, clicking a point on the chart in the top-right frame where the time is "13:16:05". In the bottom-left frame at "13:16:18", the cursor is near the center again, and by the final frame at "13:16:31", it has moved slightly. Text in the upper left of each chart includes "WTI 24.09, Lo 24.04" and the date "11/27/2013".
